name: Pre-identified caller (vars_file seeds name + policy)
notes: Demonstrates vars_file: the caller was authenticated in the Northwind app before transfer, so caller_name and policy_number are pre-populated into the compiled prompt. (Most fnol context is captured live; this shows the pre-context mechanism — it matters more for outbound agents. now is also seeded for stable date references.)
user_turns: It's still seven seven four two one zero nine.
Backed into a pole in a parking lot this morning, just me, no police.
Rear bumper, but it drives fine.
Five five five one two one two, as soon as possible.
